title: LLM Settings
subtitle: Configure your AI model provider for job applications

openrouter.name: OpenRouter (Recommended)
openrouter.description: 100+ vision models (GPT, Claude, Gemini, Qwen, Llama) via a single API key

openai.name: OpenAI
openai.description: GPT-4o, GPT-4o-mini, and other OpenAI models

anthropic.name: Anthropic
anthropic.description: Claude Sonnet, Haiku, and Opus models (direct API)

bedrock.name: AWS Bedrock
bedrock.description: Claude and other models via AWS Bedrock

ollama.name: Ollama
ollama.description: Run open-source models locally — no API key needed

openai_compatible.name: OpenAI-Compatible
openai_compatible.description: Any API that follows the OpenAI format — Together, Groq, LM Studio, vLLM, etc.

guide.howToGetKey: How to get your {{provider}} API key

openai.step1: Go to the OpenAI platform and create a free account (or sign in).
openai.step2: Add a payment method under Settings > Billing. API access requires billing even if you have ChatGPT Plus.
openai.step3: Go to the API keys page.
openai.step4: Click "Create new secret key", give it a name, then click Create.
openai.step5: Copy the key and paste it below. It starts with sk- and is only shown once.
openai.note: This is separate from your ChatGPT subscription. The API has its own pay-as-you-go billing. GPT-4o costs roughly $0.01-0.03 per job application.

anthropic.step1: Go to the Anthropic console and create a free account (or sign in).
anthropic.step2: Add a payment method under Settings > Billing. A small free trial credit may be available.
anthropic.step3: Go to the API keys page.
anthropic.step4: Click "Create Key", give it a name, then click Create.
anthropic.step5: Copy the key and paste it below. It starts with sk-ant- and is only shown once.
anthropic.note: Claude Sonnet costs roughly $0.01-0.03 per job application. The API is pay-as-you-go.

openrouter.step1: Go to OpenRouter and create a free account (or sign in).
openrouter.step2: Go to the API keys page.
openrouter.step3: Click "Create Key", give it a name, then click Create.
openrouter.step4: Copy the key and paste it below. It starts with sk-or-v1-.
openrouter.note: OpenRouter gives you access to 100+ models with a single key. Add credits at openrouter.ai/credits. Pricing varies per model.

ollama.serverUrlHint: The URL where your Ollama server is running.
ollama.noModelsHint: Enter a model name, or start your Ollama server to see available models.

openrouter.modelsAvailable: {{count}} vision models available. Prices per million tokens.
openrouter.curatedList: Showing curated list. Connect to load all vision models.
openrouter.customHint: Paste any OpenRouter model tag, e.g. openai/gpt-oss-120b:free

openaiCompatible.baseUrlHint: The full URL to the OpenAI-compatible API endpoint (e.g. https://api.together.xyz/v1 or http://localhost:1234/v1)
openaiCompatible.apiKeyHint: Leave empty if your server doesn't require authentication.
openaiCompatible.modelHint: The model name as expected by your server.
